summary: Iteration 81 - Tested Customer Portal P1 features and Zustand branchStore integration. All features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Customer Portal Login page correctly implements Login and Register tabs with proper data-testid attributes
Customer Portal Registration creates new customer with portal access, sets token in localStorage, redirects to dashboard
Customer Portal Dashboard shows credit balance, loyalty points, tier, member since, and recent orders
All Customer Portal pages (Orders, Statements, Invoices, Loyalty) load correctly with proper titles and empty states
Logout invalidates token correctly and redirects to login page
EmployeesPage correctly uses useBranchStore from Zustand for branch filtering
VirtualizedTable component is created with @tanstack/react-virtual for performance optimization (not yet integrated into pages)

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All Customer Portal flows verified working

test_credentials.customer_portal_test: Use unique email like testX@test.com with password 'test123'

seed_data_creation: None required - customer registration creates test data automatically
context_for_next_testing_agent: Customer Portal P1 features fully tested. All 7 routes work: /customer-portal (login), /customer-portal/dashboard, /customer-portal/orders, /customer-portal/statements, /customer-portal/invoices, /customer-portal/loyalty. Backend APIs at /api/customer-portal/* all working. VirtualizedTable component exists but not yet integrated into any pages.

customer_portal_login_page.login_tab: WORKING - Email and password fields with Sign In button
customer_portal_login_page.register_tab: WORKING - Full Name, Email, Phone (optional), Password fields with Create Account button

customer_portal_registration.registration_flow: WORKING - Creates new customer, sets customer_token in localStorage, redirects to dashboard

summary_cards.credit_balance: WORKING - Shows SAR 0 for new customers
summary_cards.loyalty_tier: WORKING - Shows Bronze for new customers

customer_portal_dashboard.recent_orders: WORKING - Shows 'No orders yet' for new customers
customer_portal_dashboard.navigation: WORKING - Overview, Orders, Statements, Invoices, Loyalty tabs

customer_portal_statements.title: WORKING - 'Account Statement'
customer_portal_statements.date_filters: WORKING - Start and end date pickers with Filter button

employees_page_zustand.title: WORKING - 'Employees'
employees_page_zustand.branch_filter: WORKING - Branch pills shown (Test Branch, A, b, LV, ISL, TEST_Refactored_Branch)
employees_page_zustand.employees_table: WORKING - Shows Name, Job Title, Salary, Pending, Loan, Leave, Actions

virtualized_table_component.status: CREATED - Component exists but not yet integrated into pages
virtualized_table_component.features: Virtual scrolling, configurable row height, max height, row click handler, column definitions

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real backend calls to MongoDB
